profile.name: Kon Bato
profile.title: Freelance Consultant
profile.summary: High-performing freelance operator executing specialized contracts and client acquisitions. Fast, adaptable, and focused on delivering results across various complex project parameters.

highlights: Executed high-stakes freelance contracts for asset retrieval and covert operations across the Outer Rim.
Successfully completed 20+ custom client contracts strictly under budget and ahead of schedule.
Adapted continuously to rapid changes in client requirements and unpredictable environmental variables.
Navigated complex, high-risk negotiations directly with local warlords to secure asset compliance.

education.degree: Sworn Adept in The Way of the Creed (Grade: A+)
